description: Fail-loud: chronon3d_cli render must abort loudly when the AssetManifest contains a duplicate entry (same path registered twice under different owner names). Per user-spec verbatim 'asset duplicato', this fixture extends the Test #7 fail-loud contract to the MANIFEST-VALIDATION stage. Canonical error vocabulary: Composition/Layer/Asset/Path tokens in stderr + Duplicate-specific context, NO silent fallback markers, exit code != 0, output MP4 absent, error message MUST mention the asset path + the duplicate owner names (per user-spec 'errore che indica asset+owner/layer').
_duplicate_setup_hint: Pre-create /tmp/chronon_asset_duplicate_harness/sample.png as a 1-byte external file. The composition registers the same asset path under two different owner layer names (layer_logo + layer_hero). The CLI must fail-loud at the MANIFEST-VALIDATION stage with the canonical error vocabulary + the duplicate owner names.
honesty_note: Per AGENTS.md §honesty: the duplicate detection is at the AssetManifest::commit_layer() boundary (the canonical asset-manifest preservation point per ADR-017). The CLI must fail-loud with the duplicate owner names — NEVER silently pick the first one and discard the second. Per AGENTS.md Cat-3 anti-duplication: this JSON schema is shared across all 5 Test #7 + 6 NEW asset preflight fixtures, with the rot_class + Duplicate-specific token differing per fixture — no duplicate schema files.
